titleStmt.title: SII 38.537: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 537. (A.R. No. 537 of 1912.) TIRUNĪRMALAI, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPET DISTRICT. On the north wall, Nīrvaṇṇar shrine, Raṅganātha perumāḷ temple.

p.hi: King: Jaṭāvarman Tribhuvanachchakkravarttigaḷ Śrī Sundarapāṇḍya (III) Year 17, Mīna, śu. di. 5. Wednesday, Tiruvōṇam = 30th July 1292 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of six vēli of land at Tirunīrmalai and also the assignment of taxes collected from the residents of temple quarters (tirumaḍaiviḷāgam) of the Tirunīrmalai temple, as sarvamāṉya-iṟaiyili to the god Nāyaṉar Nīrvaṇṇapperumāḷ of Tirunīrmalai in Śurattūr-nāḍu in Puliyūr-kōṭṭam, (a sub-division of) Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḻamaṇḍalam by Aruṇagiriperumāḷ alias Nīlagaṅgaraiyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti[śrī ko]ccaṭapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīsundarapāṇṭiya devaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 7vatu
minanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu pañcamiyum putankiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻama
ṇṭalattu puliyūrkkoṭṭattuc curattūrnāṭṭu tirunirmalaināyaṉār nirvaṇṇapperumāḷukku Aruṇa
kiripperumāḷāṉa nilakaṅkaraiyaneṉ Iṉṉāyaṉār tiruvaṭivāram tirunāmattukāṇi tirunirmalaiviḷākam tarappaṭi ni
lam Āṟuveliyum tirumaṭaiviḷākattil puṟakkalaṉaik kuṭimakkaḷ peril koḷḷumiṟaiyum patiṉeḻāvatu paṅkuṉi mātamu
tal sarvvamānnyaya Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭen nilakaṅkaraiyaneṉ .
Digital edition of SII 38.537 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
